result.stdout:
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information
  -a|--active <ENVIRONMENT>  The environment to set as the active one.
  -w|--working <FOLDER>      The working directory.
  -l|--loglevel <LEVEL>      The logging level for outting to the console (Verbose, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Fatal).
